1979_media.authoritative_amount_rule: TOTAL H.T. on summary, with title detail from Reversement distributeur
1979_media.period_rule: read the Period cell, never the worksheet name
calculations: separate gay and VT Sex Art Straplez sections
include prior quarter delta adjustments
validations: detail sum to section summary
section summaries plus adjustment equal TOTAL H.T.
1979_media.posting_policy: aggregate title lines by approved canonical studio

aerona.bundle_rule: one rollup plus four optional raw files
aerona.period_rule: folder period or source export period
calculations: Total equals PPM plus Rental plus Download plus Stream for Life plus Scenes plus Unlimited
validations: component sum equals Total
raw file difference equals Unlimited where raw files are present
aerona.posting_policy: aggregate rollup lines by canonical studio

amg.authoritative_amount_rule: Payout on nonhighlighted revenue share rows only
calculations: Payout equals license fee minus 25 percent distribution fee
validations: nonmanual rows reconcile
manual highlighted rows routed to review
amg.posting_policy: do not automatically post highlighted flat fee rows

calculations: net payable equals gross line totals times 35 percent
validations: gross line total times rate reconciles to header within rounding

calculations: line total equals quantity times unit price where meaningful
validations: line totals plus adjustments equal final amount

dusk.authoritative_amount_rule: footer total from Payout NL plus Payout INT plus optional VOD total
calculations: ignore duplicate top and bottom summary rows
validations: title rows reconcile to footer
PDF total matches xlsx
dusk.posting_policy: aggregate preassigned titles by canonical studio

calculations: preserve source GBP amount and exchange rate
validations: USD amount equals GBP amount times exchange rate within source rounding
currency labels consistent
erigo.posting_policy: split named sections by studio and require human approval

calculations: streaming plus store equals total
validations: producer summary total reconciles
detail completeness warning when producer summary exceeds detail
erika_lust.posting_policy: post producer summary by canonical studio

calculations: store period earned, prior balance, payments, fees, and net payable separately
validations: VOD plus Linear plus SVOD equals current period royalties
net due minus wire fee equals highlighted payable
gamma_licensing.posting_policy: post highlighted payable under approved legacy policy

gamma_adult_time.canonical_customer: Gamma Broadcast Group Inc. Adult Time
gamma_adult_time.bundle_rule: two PDFs for the same period
gamma_adult_time.authoritative_amount_rule: sum Revshare grand totals across both reports
calculations: sum per scene Revshare
validations: scene sum equals each report grand total
two report totals equal bundle total
gamma_adult_time.posting_policy: aggregate bundle amount by Team Skeet mapping

girlfriends_films.bundle_rule: one reused workbook with monthly tabs
girlfriends_films.authoritative_amount_rule: highlighted bottom total after 65 percent profit share
calculations: use invoice lines or Total item rows, never both
apply 65 percent share
validations: raw line total times 65 percent equals payable
girlfriends_films.posting_policy: aggregate monthly payable by canonical studio

hpg.bundle_rule: monthly folders, one xlsx per studio and channel, optional paired PDF
hpg.authoritative_amount_rule: Canal O, Netgem T, Proximus dynamic final Revenue column
calculations: coerce numeric strings in Proximus
validations: line sums equal xlsx total
paired PDF total matches when present
hpg.posting_policy: one posting per studio report or approved aggregate

knpb.bundle_rule: one xlsx plus matching 42 page PDF
knpb.authoritative_amount_rule: Total Income summary and T Revenue title detail
knpb.period_rule: credit note date and statement period
calculations: T Revenue equals download revenue plus rental revenue
validations: title sum equals studio summary
studio summary equals Total Income
PDF matches xlsx
knpb.posting_policy: aggregate title lines by canonical studio

level5.period_rule: period field can contain multiple months
calculations: sales and rentals use coin rate and share, subscription share is already an amount
validations: component lines equal each studio total
studio totals equal total net

new_sensations.authoritative_amount_rule: Paid amount minus 30 percent fee minus expenses
calculations: use Paid detail only
deduct expense sheet when present
validations: detail quantity equals summary
detail amount equals paid amount
final due reconciles
new_sensations.posting_policy: one posting per workbook mapped to canonical studio

omnet.bundle_rule: one image based workbook per month
calculations: 40 percent share of revenue with source rounding
validations: label shares sum to report share
title detail reconciles where visible
omnet.posting_policy: map label codes through an approved code alias table

pulse.authoritative_amount_rule: final Net Royalty Due or Balance Due on Summary
calculations: preserve sales, collections, rate periods, expenses, reserves, payments, and balance
validations: final formula captured
positive amount matches historical posting after configured rounding
pulse.posting_policy: post positive balances only, carry negative balances forward

sonifi.bundle_rule: one source statement plus an internal allocation workbook
sonifi.authoritative_amount_rule: Royalty vendor amount on DOCX statement
calculations: source royalty equals sales times six percent within line rounding
validations: title sales and royalties sum to grand totals
sonifi.posting_policy: do not create studio postings until allocation policy and workbook formulas are approved

aebn.bundle_rule: one title workbook plus portal screenshot
aebn.authoritative_amount_rule: line Total for allocations, portal payout for declared payable
calculations: do not rebuild Total from rounded PPM, Rental, and Download displays
validations: line Total sum versus portal declared total
component rounding difference recorded
aebn.posting_policy: aggregate line Total by canonical studio and handle declared difference explicitly

velvet.bundle_rule: expected workbook plus PDF with eight channel tabs
validations: file identity must not match AEBN
velvet.posting_policy: no posting until correct source is supplied
